sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: MPC Q1 2026: 순이익 5억 1,100만 달러, 조정 EBITDA 28억 달러로 전년 동기 대비 큰 폭 개선

keyPoints.text: 2026년 1분기 순이익(MPC 귀속분) 5억 1,100만 달러(희석 EPS 1.73달러)를 기록했으며, 이는 전년 동기 순손실 대비 대폭 개선된 결과다. 조정 순이익은 4억 8,700만 달러(EPS 1.65달러)였다.
1분기 영업활동 현금흐름 11억 달러를 창출했으며, 이는 2026년 계획된 정기보수 활동의 약 40%를 완료하면서 달성한 성과다.
R&M 세그먼트 조정 EBITDA가 13억 7,700만 달러로, 전년 동기 4억 8,900만 달러 대비 크게 개선됐다. 크랙 스프레드 상승이 주 원인이다.

businessChanges.text: 가치 제고 자본 전략을 실행 중으로 Garyville 제트 프로젝트가 Q1 2026에 가동됐으며, El Paso FCC 업그레이드(Q2 2026 목표)와 Robinson 제트 프로젝트(Q3 2026 목표)를 진행 중이다.
MPLX Permian 성장 전략을 추진 중이며, 2026~2027년 MPC에 대한 연간 12.5% 배분 성장을 지원할 것으로 기대하고 있다.

financialHighlights.text: 조정 EBITDA 28억 달러로 전년 동기 20억 달러 대비 개선됐다.
R&M 마진이 배럴당 17.74달러로 전년 동기 13.38달러 대비 상승했으며, 원유 처리 용량 가동률 89%, 총 처리량은 일 290만 배럴이었다.
미드스트림 세그먼트 조정 EBITDA는 15억 9,800만 달러로 전년 동기 17억 2,000만 달러 대비 소폭 감소했다.

watchItems.text: 2026년 계획 정기보수 잔여 물량이 Q2~Q3에 집중될 경우 단기 처리량 압박이 가능하며, El Paso FCC와 Robinson 프로젝트의 완료 일정과 마진 기여가 핵심 확인 포인트다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 mpcq12026earningsrelease.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Marathon Petroleum Corp. Reports First-Quarter 2026 Results • First-quarter net income attributable to MPC of $511 million, or $1.73 per diluted share, adjusted net income of $487 million, or $1.65 per diluted share • Cash from operations of $1.1 billion, reflecting safe and reliable performance while completing approximately 40% of 2026 planned turnaround activity • Executing value-enhancing capital strategy; Garyville jet project online in 1Q26, progressing El Paso FCC upgrade (2Q26 target completion) and Robinson jet project (3Q26 target completion) • Progressing MPLX Permian growth strategy, expected to support 12.5% annual distribution growth to MPC in 2026 and 2027  Normalized numeric aliases: $511 million = 5억 1,100만 달러; $487 million = 4억 8,700만 달러; $1.1 billion = 11억 달러; $1.0 billion = 10억 달러; $5 billion = 50억 달러; $511 = 511달러; $1.73 = 1.73달러; $487 = 487달러; $1.1 = 1.1달러; $1.65 = 1.65달러; $1.0 = 1.0달러; $5 = 5달러.

FINDLAY, Ohio, May 5, 2026 – Marathon Petroleum Corp. (NYSE: MPC) today reported net income attributable to MPC of $511 million, or $1.73 per diluted share, for the first quarter of 2026 . This compares with a net loss attributable to MPC of $(74) million, or $(0.24) per diluted share, for the first quarter of 2025. Adjusted net income was $487 million, or $1.65 per diluted share, for the first quarter of 2026. Cash provided by operating activities was $1.1 billion for the first quarter of 2026, compared with $(64) million for the first quarter of 2025. The first quarter of 2026 adjusted earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization (adjusted EBITDA) was $2.8 billion, compared with $2.0 billion for the first  Normalized numeric aliases: $511 million = 5억 1,100만 달러; $487 million = 4억 8,700만 달러; $1.1 billion = 11억 달러; $2.8 billion = 28억 달러; $2.0 billion = 20억 달러; $511 = 511달러; $1.73 = 1.73달러; $487 = 487달러; $1.1 = 1.1달러; $1.65 = 1.65달러; $2.8 = 2.8달러; $2.0 = 2.0달러.

said Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer Maryann Mannen. “Accelerating our planned turnaround activity in the quarter enhances our operational readiness to supply the elevated levels of current market demand. MPLX progressed its mid-single digit growth strategy through expansions across its Natural Gas and NGL value chains, underpinning distribution growth and strengthening cash flow stability to MPC, positioning us to lead in capital return.” 1 Results from Operations Adjusted EBITDA (unaudited) Three Months Ended March 31, (In millions) 2026 2025 Refining & Marketing segment adjusted EBITDA $ 1,377 $ 489 Midstream segment adjusted EBITDA 1,598 1,720 Renewable  Normalized numeric aliases: $1,377 = 1,377달러; $489 = 489달러; $2,763 = 2,763달러; $1,975 = 1,975달러; 1,377 million = 13억 7,700만 달러; 1,598 million = 15억 9,800만 달러; 1,720 million = 17억 2,000만 달러; 3,013 million = 30억 1,300만 달러; 2,763 million = 27억 6,300만 달러; 2,167 million = 21억 6,700만 달러; 1,975 million = 19억 7,500만 달러.

billion in the first quarter of 2026, versus $489 million for the first quarter of 2025. R&M segment adjusted EBITDA was $5.37 per barrel for the first quarter of 2026, versus $1.91 per barrel for the first quarter of 2025. Segment adjusted EBITDA excludes refining planned turnaround costs, which totaled $530 million in the first quarter of 2026 and $454 million in the first quarter of 2025. R&M margin was $17.74 per barrel for the first quarter of 2026, versus $13.38 per barrel for the first quarter of 2025. Crude capacity utilization was 89%, resulting in total throughput of 2.9 million barrels per day (bpd) for the first quarter of 2026 .
